name: Light Pill #11 - The Stone Speaker
description: The Stone Speaker - A glowing capsule that reveals the ancient language of mountains and stones to those who dare to listen to earth's slow wisdom. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Stone-gray wool robes with crystal formations growing at the hem
Geode that opens to reveal glowing crystal patterns
Bare feet fused with the mountain stone
High mountain peak with floating stone monoliths
Mountains speak in a language of millennia, and their patience is absolute.
You must listen to three stones - one from the mountain's peak, one from the river's bed, and one from a place of ancient worship. Each will tell you a secret that has never been spoken aloud.
Must be taken while touching natural stone

properties.ai_prompt: Ancient fashion editorial of The Stone Speaker on a high mountain peak with floating stone monoliths, wearing stone-gray wool robes with growing crystal formations, holding an open geode that reveals glowing crystal patterns. Granite Pulse aura with Slow Resonance energy, bare feet appearing fused with the mountain stone, cinematic lighting that shows the slow movement of geological time, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible mineral formations and ancient stone textures.
